motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: The only easing in the system. Used for every transition and reveal. Ease-out-expo family. No bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: reveal-duration
motion.purpose: Default duration for scroll reveals and image hover scale.

motion.name: state-duration
motion.purpose: Duration for button/link state transitions (background, color, border).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The system's only button. Transparent with hairline-strong border, label-typography, square corners. Fills with Aged Brass on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 1rem 2.5rem; font-family: 'Chillax', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #e8e4df; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14); background: transparent; border-radius: 0; transition: background 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.19,1,0.22,1), color 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.19,1,0.22,1), border-color 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.19,1,0.22,1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #8b7355; border-color: #8b7355; color: #111111; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid #c4b5a0; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: The signature micro-element. Bracketed, uppercase, 0.7rem, 0.2em letter-spacing, Aged Brass. Appears at the top of every section.
components.css: .ds-section-label { font-family: 'Chillax', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2em; color: #8b7355; margin-bottom: 2rem; }

components.name: Section Heading
components.description: Cormorant Garamond 300, fluid clamp scale, the dominant heading inside each section.
components.html: The details that define a stay.
components.css: .ds-section-heading { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Georgia', serif; font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 4.2rem); font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.15; color: #e8e4df; margin-bottom: 2rem; }

components.name: Feature Solo (Editorial Break)
components.description: Text-only editorial pause between image-led feature blocks. Centered, hairline top+bottom borders, max-width 640px.
components.html:
Layered Comfort

Four independently zoned climate systems. Acoustic-grade glazing on every window.
components.css: .ds-feature-solo { max-width: 640px; padding: clamp(3rem, 6vw, 5rem) 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); margin: 0 auto; text-align: center; } .ds-feature-solo h3 { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', 'Georgia', serif; font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 2.6rem); font-weight: 300; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; color: #e8e4df; } .ds-feature-solo p { font-family: 'Chillax', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(0.95rem, 1.1vw, 1.05rem); color: #8b8178; line-height: 1.8; max-width: 48ch; margin: 0 auto; }

components.name: Hairline Divider
components.description: 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.08). The default way to separate anything.

narrative.overview: An editorial residence microsite that treats a coastal Cyprus rental the way a serious magazine treats its subject: with restraint, precision, and the assumption that the reader has taste. The system is built on tinted-black surfaces, warm-bronze accents used sparingly, and a serif/sans pairing (Cormorant Garamond + Chillax) that lets the typography do the work that gradients and shadows would do in a lesser site. Depth comes from hairline borders and tonal shifts, never from shadows. Motion is scroll-revealed, staggered, ease-out, and never performs.
keyCharacteristics: Warm bronze accent used on ≤10% of any screen
Square corners (border-radius: 0) with a 2px exception for image wraps
Hairline borders as the primary divider vocabulary
Serif display + sans body; hierarchy through weight contrast and fluid clamp() scales
All motion uses cubic-bezier(0.19, 1, 0.22, 1); no bounce, no elastic

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Aged Brass appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Tinted-Black Rule
rules.body: Never use #000 or #fff. Every neutral is tinted warm.

rules.name: The Anomaly Quarantine
rules.body: Legacy #00FF33 and #AEE2FF violate the palette and must be replaced with Aged Brass on any redesign.

rules.name: The Serif-Heads-Only Rule
rules.body: Cormorant Garamond is for headings and lead text only. Body, labels, buttons, nav use Chillax.

rules.name: The Label Voice Rule
rules.body: Section labels are always uppercase, 0.7rem, 0.2em letter-spacing, bracketed [ Like This ], Aged Brass.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow permitted. Depth comes from hairlines and tonal layering only.

rules.name: The Hover-Transform Rule
rules.body: Only motion on a resting surface is slow transform: scale() on contained images. No translateY lift, no shadow-on-hover.

dos: Do use Aged Brass (#8b7355) on section labels, the hero CTA border, and at most one accent element per viewport.
Do set every heading in Cormorant Garamond at weight 300, every body/label in Chillax.
Do separate sections and elements with 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.08) hairlines.
Do use clamp() for every type size and every major spacing value.
Do reveal content on scroll with cubic-bezier(0.19, 1, 0.22, 1) easing, staggered.
donts: Don't propagate legacy #00FF33 or #AEE2FF; replace with Aged Brass.
Don't use box-shadow on resting surfaces.
Don't use border-left/right >1px as colored stripes.
Don't use background-clip: text with gradients.
Don't build hero-metric or identical card-grid templates.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing.
Don't write spa-copy (indulge, unwind, luxurious, the ultimate).
Don't introduce a second saturated color.
